scope: zero-training time-localized attribution of whether a quotient Tweedie endpoint estimate recovers and causally supplies the persistent high-noise clean-coordination signal

topology.pair_support: all directed non-self atom pairs, at most N(N-1)=380 for Alex-MP-20

carrier.coefficient_policy: one clean-oracle coefficient is fitted on the train panel and reused unchanged for all four validation fields

tweedie.wrapping_policy: topology distances use exact closest periodic images; no intermediate coordinate clipping

decision_rule.causal: if the Tweedie field passes both focus-time topology criteria and all carrier criteria, authorize only a separately frozen staged/self-conditioned coordinate proposal
decision_rule.predictive_not_causal: if the topology criteria pass but any carrier criterion fails, attribute the remaining limitation to nonlinear topology-to-vector-field conversion before considering a narrowly time-gated learned latent-pair field
decision_rule.not_predictive: if either topology criterion fails, do not build ACF and revisit probability-path conditional variance
decision_rule.boundary: This audit performs zero optimizer steps on the existing two-pass checkpoint and keeps the v2 panels, pair definition and structure bootstrap fixed. It cannot modify production, rescue H1a, add exposure/seeds, resume sampler search, or authorize H1b-H6, tensor conditioning, oracle work, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
